solvai undhan kadhal mella

un marbiley idam podhumey

Yen indru idaiveli kuraikiradhey
medhuvaaga idhayangal inaikiradhey

Un swasangal ennai theendinaal

Nadhiyinil oru ilai vilukiradhey

karai seruma un kai seruma
edhirgaalamaey

enkaagave pirandhaan ivan
ennai kaakkave varuvaan ivan
en penmayai vendraan ivan
anbaanavan.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yaaro Ivan'?

'Yaaro Ivan' explores themes of love and longing, expressing the emotions tied to a romantic relationship.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie 'Udhayam NH4'?

The song reflects the emotional journey of the characters, highlighting their romantic struggles and connections.

Who are the singers and music director of 'Yaaro Ivan'?

The song is sung by GV Prakash Kumar and Saindhavi, with music composed by GV Prakash Kumar himself.

When was 'Yaaro Ivan' released?

'Yaaro Ivan' was released on March 31, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yaaro Ivan, the characters in Udhayam NH4 express their deep feelings of love and yearning through poignant lyrics and a melodious tune. The song beautifully encapsulates the essence of romantic relationships, evoking a sense of nostalgia and longing. With GV Prakash Kumar and Saindhavi's harmonious voices, it resonates with anyone who has experienced love's complexities. This heartfelt melody serves as a backdrop to the emotional narrative of the film, making it a memorable piece.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yaaro Ivan from the movie Udhayam NH4 is a beautiful duet that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of GV Prakash Kumar and Saindhavi, this song resonates with deep emotions and nostalgia. The heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar complement the soulful composition, making it a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: Who is this person? Who is this person? He is someone who wants my love, he is my beloved.
He is the one who is crying in your love, he is the one who is speaking in your sight, he is the one who comes as a shadow on your path.
He is the one who brings rain in my arms, he is the one who brings sunlight in my way, he knows my needs in the darkness of my eyes.
Wherever you are, there is a way to express your love softly. My innocence is enough for your embrace.
Today, my heart is filled with joy and is singing happily.
Your touch is calling out to my touch... (Who is this person?)
Your breaths are pulling me, will my thoughts change with your fragrance?
In the river, a small light is shining, amidst the waves, it is struggling. Will your hand meet mine or will it be a barrier?
He was born for me, he will come to protect me, he is someone who wants my love, he is my beloved.
He is the one who brings rain in my arms, he is the one who brings sunlight in my way, he knows my needs in the darkness of my eyes.
